context:
Evaluating a Coralogix support response for this user question:

I need to drop only datapoints where attributes["tenant"] is missing, but keep the metric itself when other datapoints are valid. Should this be metric context or datapoint context?

checklist.name: context-datapoint
checklist.description: The response matches the pattern: (?i)(context:? ?datapoint|datapoint context)

checklist.name: explains-that-per-series-per-point-filtering
checklist.description: Explains that per-series/per-point filtering belongs in datapoint context, not metric context, and avoids dropping the entire metric unintentionally.
